title: Sky Transition
result_description: A whip-pan up to the sky in one location cuts seamlessly into a whip-pan down at a new location, so you appear to teleport between places through the sky.

inputs.name: scene1_whip_up
inputs.what_to_film: Film the first location, then whip-pan UP to the sky (fast tilt) at the end of the shot.

inputs.name: scene2_whip_down
inputs.what_to_film: Start on the sky and whip-pan DOWN into the new location. Match the pan speed and direction to scene 1.

params.note: place scene 2 directly after scene 1 on the timeline
cut at the fastest, most-blurred frame of the pan, when it points at plain sky
cut at the fastest, most-blurred frame, when it points at plain sky
add a quick blur or directional-blur transition over the cut
optional: mask the sky so the new scene's sky bleeds in early

result.description: The two whip-pans join through the sky with no visible seam.
success_criteria: Pan speed and direction match across the cut
Cut lands on the blurred plain-sky frame so the seam is hidden
